description: Gaussian Error Linear Unit (GELU) activation function. GELU(x) = x * Φ(x) where Φ(x) is the cumulative distribution function of the standard normal distribution. When approximate='tanh', uses approximation: 0.5 * x * (1 + tanh(sqrt(2/π) * (x + 0.044715 * x^3))). Supports input tensors of arbitrary shape and data types float32, float16, bfloat16.
